---
title: "Talks & Videos"
toc: false
---

## Going Bayes: Shifting Our Testing Methods To Reflect Our Priorities

::: {.post-meta}
Nov 6, 2025 · Intuit Tech Stories · Bayesian · Experimentation
:::

[![](https://images.eq.tm.intuit.com/EloquaImages/clients/IntuitPeopleAndPlaces/%7Ba14c4a51-e0a0-4974-8af5-235d5cd9dabd%7D_tech-stories-nov6_going-bayes_masthead-1024x470.jpg){.talk-thumbnail}](https://share.vidyard.com/watch/wqUpv9CUAXj9cSrFzAQwQ3){target="_blank"}

How aligning business priorities with Bayesian Risk-Based Testing reduced Intuit's experiment
duration by over 60%. Covers the tradeoffs of moving away from frequentist defaults, the math
behind Bayesian risk-based decisions, and how we scaled adoption across data science, product,
and leadership teams.

[Watch →](https://share.vidyard.com/watch/wqUpv9CUAXj9cSrFzAQwQ3){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

---

## How Intuit Uses Dash Enterprise

::: {.post-meta}
Mar 15, 2024 · Plotly · Dash · Experimentation Tooling
:::

[![](https://images.prismic.io/plotly-marketing-website-2/78eadf9c-7427-4ca9-b1f7-e62d411a59f4_intuit-app-2.png?auto=compress,format){.talk-thumbnail}](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IpcTF0UAIVQ){target="_blank"}

Highlight reel from a Plotly webinar on building Intuit's experimentation suite in Dash Enterprise —
a sample size calculator, sequential AB testing app, and experiment simulation tool — adopted by
500+ users across Intuit's A2D org. Reduced experiment runtime by 70%+ with zero HTML or
engineering experience required.

[Watch →](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IpcTF0UAIVQ){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
